message: Audited 2 target test files for tech_debt markers (TODO/FIXME/XXX/HACK); 0 actionable markers found — files are clean. The only matches were the constant identifier TODOS_PILARES (an array of 5 Pilar strings: cabala/astrologia/tantrica/odu/iching), which is just a variable name, not a TODO comment. No code changes required. Pre-existing typecheck errors in packages/core-iching/src/practices.ts are unrelated to target files (test files typecheck clean when scoped). Consistent with prior audit notes from 13:19 and 13:38 today.
tool_note: ast_grep not installed in this environment; fell back to grep which is the documented fallback for the same audit pattern used in prior cycles.
